discover_place API (discplace-Izx1rQVSh8njYpP) returned 64 events through ~2026-07-01; zero crypto/web3 (light on crypto as expected); surfaced 7 NYC AI/dev events in window.
api.lu.ma/search/get-results returned 401 'You are not signed in.' — auth-gated, richest crypto source unavailable.
WebFetch HTTP 403 Forbidden; browser navigation to domain not allowed (luma-only allowlist); no Bright Data/Apify proxy configured.

Alumni portal login-gated; not publicly accessible.

'Stay tuned for more events in 2026!' — genuine empty state.
